perks.summary: check a LaTeX treatment plan for the 10 required sections, SMART goals, HIPAA notice, signature, and leftover placeholders (read-only)
validate treatment-plan content quality: SMART goals, evidence, patient-centeredness, safety, medication, ICD-10, timeframes, metrics (read-only)
extract treatment phases / appointments / milestones from a plan and render a text (or matplotlib) timeline
copy a specialty LaTeX treatment-plan template (general/rehab/mental-health/chronic/perioperative/pain) to the record store
generate an AI scientific schematic (Nano Banana 2 via OpenRouter) from a natural-language description
